title: What kind of fish are they?

meanings.usage: 修饰物或事，表示令人害怕
指对鱼类进行过度捕获
用于海上开采石油的结构

meanings.meaning: 笼子； cage 也可用作动词表示把...关进笼子
meanings.usage: 保护性结构，可作名词或动词
指体型巨大或可怕的生物
the absence of something 表示某物的缺失
常与throw连用，表示扔到船外
常与into连用，表示撞上某人或某物
可表示体型变大或植物生长

phrases.usage: 炸鱼薯条，英国经典快餐

examples.en: Fish and chips has always been a favourite dish in Britain.
examples.zh: 炸鱼薯条一直是英国人最喜爱的菜肴。

phrases.usage: 吓得魂不附体；不知所措

examples.en: Divers have been frightened out of their wits by giant fish.
examples.zh: 潜水员们被巨大的鱼吓得魂不附体。

examples.en: Giant fish are bumping into divers as they work.
examples.zh: 巨鱼在潜水员工作时撞到他们。

examples.en: So it comes as a surprise to learn that giant fish are terrifying the divers.
examples.zh: 因此，听说巨鱼令潜水员们恐惧是令人惊讶的。

phrases.usage: 让某事被做（由他人完成）

examples.en: They have had special cages made to protect them.
examples.zh: 他们让人制作了特殊的笼子来保护他们。

examples.en: The fish are not sharks or killer whales, but favourite eating varieties.
examples.zh: 这些鱼不是鲨鱼或虎鲸，而是人们喜爱的食用品种。

examples.en: As a result, the fish just eat and eat and grow and grow.
examples.zh: 结果，这些鱼只是不停地吃，不停地长大。

examples.en: They grow to unnatural sizes, sometimes as much as twelve feet in length.
examples.zh: 它们长到不正常的尺寸，有时可达十二英尺长。

examples.en: Divers often have to work in darkness a hundred feet under water.
examples.zh: 潜水员经常需要在水下百尺的黑暗中工作。

examples.en: The warm water round the hot oil pipes under the sea causes fish to grow.
examples.zh: 海底热油管周围的温暖海水导致鱼长大。

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去开始一直持续到现在并可能继续下去的动作，强调动作的持续性
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 用于描述一个持续进行的动作，常与all + 时间段或for/since连用

examples.en: Fish has become more and more expensive as the oceans have been overfished.
examples.zh: 由于海洋被过度捕捞，鱼变得越来越贵。

examples.en: Divers have been frightened out of their wits.
examples.zh: 潜水员们一直被吓得魂不附体。

grammar.title: 现在完成时的被动语态 (Present Perfect Passive)
grammar.definition: 表示一个已完成的动作对现在造成的影响，动作的承受者作为主语
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 强调动作的承受者而非执行者

examples.en: Special cages have been made to protect them.
examples.zh: 特殊笼子已被制作来保护他们。

grammar.title: 因果关系表达 (Cause and Effect)
grammar.definition: 用不同方式表达原因和结果
grammar.structure: 原因（名词短语/从句）+ cause/lead to/result in + 结果
grammar.usage: 用于说明某事发生的原因及其后果

examples.en: Three factors have caused these fish to grow so large.
examples.zh: 三个因素导致这些鱼长得如此巨大。

examples.en: The warm water causes fish to grow large.
examples.zh: 温暖的海水导致鱼长大。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing（现在完成进行时）

original.en: Divers have been frightened out of their wits.
original.zh: 潜水员们一直被吓得魂不附体。

imitations.en: She has been working on this project for months.
imitations.zh: 她已经在这个项目上工作了几个月。

imitations.en: It has been raining all day.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has + been + 过去分词（现在完成时的被动语态）

imitations.en: Many animals have been protected by law.
imitations.zh: 许多动物已被法律保护。

original.en: The fish are not sharks or killer whales, but favourite eating varieties.
original.zh: 这些鱼不是鲨鱼或虎鲸，而是人们喜爱的食用品种。

imitations.en: He is not a teacher, but a doctor.
The problem is not money but time.

original.en: As a result, the fish just eat and eat and grow and grow.
original.zh: 结果，这些鱼只是不停地吃，不停地长大。

imitations.en: He didn't study. As a result, he failed the exam.
imitations.zh: 他没有学习。结果，他考试不及格。

imitations.en: It rained heavily. As a result, the game was cancelled.
imitations.zh: 雨下得很大。结果，比赛被取消了。
